name: Italian Chicken Pastry Bites
recipeInstructions: Preheat oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit. In a skillet, combine chicken, spaghetti sauce, and minced garlic; heat until warmed through. Separate crescent rolls into triangles. In the center of each triangle, distribute the chicken mixture. If desired, distribute the cheese similarly. Surround the chicken with the sides of the roll and pinch closed. Bake for 15 minutes, or until golden brown, on a baking stone.
